title: salvia verbenaca var. disermas
intro: Salvia verbenaca var. disermas, also known as perennial clary sage, is a variety of the Salvia verbenaca plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Salvia verbenaca var. disermas include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Salvia verbenaca var. disermas include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical applications and ingestible remedies for various health issues.
